# Sunum Hazırlık Notları

## 1) Sunum Yapısı (Temiz ve Profesyonel)

### Slide 1 — Problem Statement

**Soru:** Can synthetic data generated by a GAN improve classification performance?

Ek not:
- Dataset: Apple, Orange, Banana
- Resolution: 32x32
- Yaklaşık 1000 real image
- Dataset hafif dengesiz, ancak dengesizlik şiddetli değil.

### Slide 2 — Method Overview

Pipeline:

Real data  
-> Train GAN  
-> Generate synthetic data  
-> Train classifier under multiple scenarios  
-> Compare accuracy + time

Ek metod notu:
- Preprocessing ortak utility modülünde merkezileştirildi (`utils.py`) ve tüm deneylerde tutarlı kullanıldı.
- Synthetic dataset class-balanced üretildi.

### Slide 3 — GAN Architecture

Anlatılacak noktalar:
- Conditional GAN
- `z_dim = 128`
- Generator: ConvTranspose blocks
- Discriminator: Conv blocks
- Loss: BCE
- Optimizer: Adam (`2e-4`, `betas=(0.5,0.999)`)

Hazır cümle:

> We used a Conditional DCGAN to incorporate class information into both generator and discriminator.

`32x32` seçiminin amacı (slayta direkt koy):
- GAN eğitimini daha stabil yapmak (mode collapse riskini azaltmak)
- Daha hızlı deney döngüsü
- Aynı compute ile daha fazla ablation koşusu çalıştırmak

### Slide 4 — GAN Evaluation

Gösterilecek:
- Sample grids
- Mode collapse yok
- Class consistency var
- Artifact var

Hazır cümle:

> The generator captures coarse class-level structure but lacks high-frequency detail.

Alternatif cümle:

> The generator produces visually coherent fruits with class consistency. Some minor artifacts exist due to limited data and low resolution.

### Slide 5 — Classification Scenarios

| Scenario | Accuracy |
|---|---|
| Real-only | 94.3% |
| Synth-only | 87.7% |
| Real+Synth | 94.3% |

Detay metrik (istersen ek satır):
- Macro F1: `0.9432 / 0.8775 / 0.9409`
- Train time (s): `56.72 / 23.88 / 81.88`

### Slide 6 — Low Data Analysis

Vurgu:
- %25 real
- %50 real

Hazır cümle:

> Synthetic data shows stronger impact in low-data regimes.

### Slide 7 — Computational Time

Örnek süreler:
- Real-only: 56s
- Synth-only: 23s
- Real+Synth: 81s

Hazır cümle:

> Adding synthetic data increases computational cost but does not always improve accuracy when sufficient real data is available.

### Slide 8 — Final Conclusion

1. GAN successfully learns class-level features.
2. Synthetic-only data is usable but inferior to real.
3. Synthetic data is most beneficial in low-data regimes.

## 2) Mülakat Soruları ve Cevap Stratejileri

### Why did you use 32x32?

> 32x32 ensures stable GAN training, reduces computational cost, and allows running multiple experimental scenarios efficiently.

### Why Conditional GAN?

> Without conditioning, the generator might ignore minority classes or collapse to dominant modes. Conditioning enforces class control.

### Why normalize to [-1,1]?

> The generator uses tanh activation, so matching the real data distribution improves adversarial stability.

### Why does synthetic-only perform worse?

> Due to distribution shift. The GAN approximates the real distribution but cannot fully capture high-frequency details and background variability.

### Why didn’t Real+Synth improve accuracy?

> When sufficient real data is available, synthetic data does not add significant new information. Its benefit is more visible in low-data regimes.

### What are GAN weaknesses?

- Mode collapse
- Training instability
- Sensitive hyperparameters
- No explicit likelihood estimation

## 3) Hoca Zorlarsa: İyileştirme Yolları

### How would you improve GAN quality?

- Use WGAN-GP instead of vanilla GAN
- Use spectral normalization
- Increase resolution
- Train longer
- Use data augmentation
- Increase dataset size

### Why not use transfer learning?

> Task explicitly forbade transfer learning, so the generator was trained from scratch to ensure experimental fairness.

## 4) En Kritik Bilimsel Nokta

Soru:

> So... is GAN useful or not?

Cevap:

> GAN-generated data is not a replacement for real data. It is most valuable when real data is scarce.

## 5) Sunum Süresi Planı

Sunum süresine göre konuşma metni çıkar:
- 5 dakika
- 10 dakika
- 15 dakika
